title: Physical activity levels are positively related to progression-free survival and reduced adverse events in advanced ER+ breast cancer.
abstract: Increased levels of physical activity are associated with a reduction of breast cancer mortality, especially in postmenopausal women with positive hormone receptor status. So far, previous observational case-control and cohort studies have focused on associations between overall leisure time physical activity and survival of women with breast cancer in general.
trial_name: Everolimus in Postmenopausal Hormone-Receptor-Positive Advanced Breast Cancer
